Besides the above four types of combinations described by Sage
Parasara. Mantreshwara in Pha!deepika describes the following two types
of combinations:
(1) Two pfanets in trina! house from each other. For example,
Sun in Aries and Jupiter in Leo.
(2) Two planets in an angle or Kendra from each other. For
example. SUn in Aries and Jupiter in Cancer.
